title: P4: debug-monitor PC command (decode + map + render)
requirement: Add a 'debug-monitor' PC command that decodes a CDL capture and renders named, timestamped trace using a cdl_map JSON. Two-layer decode: outer 0xF0 RELAY/0xF1 STATUS envelopes (probe-stamped) wrap inner target CDL frames (HELLO/TRACE/LOG/MEM_DATA/BP_HIT/ACK/NAK) that may split across envelopes. Apply the map: channel id->name + per-channel value width + target_tick presence for TRACE; symbol name<->address for MEM_DATA/READ_MEM. Pure library (cdl_monitor.py, no serial I/O in lib, mirroring cdl_codec); CLI reads canned bytes from a file/stdin so the whole path is CI-testable. Live serial is an optional pyserial-guarded extra. Also: pure command-encode helper (H2T) with symbol resolution for READ_MEM. Imports cdl_codec (the reference impl).

checklist.text: cdl_monitor.py: two-layer Deframer (outer RELAY -> inner CDL), inner state survives across envelopes
TRACE decode applies map: ch->name, value width per channel, optional tick gated by target_tick cap
MEM_DATA/READ_MEM symbol<->address resolution via map symbols
Render: named, timestamped, human-readable + --json structured output
debug-monitor CLI subcommand: --map + file/stdin input; pyserial optional, import-guarded
Tests: canned-capture decode incl split-across-RELAY frame, STATUS drops, named trace, round-trip cmd; flake8 clean
Acceptance (P4 gate): decodes canned frames + renders named trace in CI; full suite green

notes.author: CC
notes.text: P4 implemented on branch p4-debug-monitor. New cdl_monitor.py (Monitor/MonitorMap/Event): two-layer decode (outer 0xF0 RELAY/0xF1 STATUS envelopes -> persistent inner CDL Deframer, so a target frame split across envelopes is reassembled), map application (channel id->name + per-channel TRACE value width + target_tick-gated tick, MEM_DATA addr->symbol tagging), per-message renderers, and a symbol-resolving encode_command (H2T). New debug-monitor CLI subcommand (--map + --input/stdin/--hex; optional pyserial-guarded --port live capture; text or JSONL). 31 new tests (lib + CLI acceptance incl split-across-RELAY, STATUS drops, named trace, command round-trip). Full suite 369 passed, flake8 clean, CI hard gates green. Self-review: 3 adversarial finder agents -> fixed 5 findings (malformed-map shape now raises ValueError so CLI emits clean map_load_failed; encode_command unknown symbol KeyError->ValueError; BP_HIT ambiguous length flagged not silently truncated; error-branch dict(frame) simplification; extracted _extra_fields helper to dedupe header-key filter). Cross-file API tracer clean. NOT hardware-validated (P4 gate is CI-only: decode canned frames + render named trace -- met).
